title: Subject
description: Subject configuration with load requirements and resource needs

block_length.description: Number of consecutive periods if block required

requires_resource.description: Whether subject requires a special resource/room

resource_type.description: Type of resource required (e.g., 'Computer Lab', 'Physics Lab')

prefer_morning.description: Whether this subject prefers morning slots

avoid_after_lunch.description: Whether to avoid scheduling after lunch

is_specialist.description: Whether this is a specialist subject (rare languages, arts). Gets scheduling priority.

is_language_block.description: Whether this subject is part of a language block that requires synchronized scheduling across streams.
